name: ClaimsIntake_DU_document_processing_automation
description: Extracts structured claim data from a CMS-1500 claim PDF using the CascadeClaim Document Understanding model. Call this tool first for any claim processing request to obtain the structured fields (claim_id, member_id, dates, policy info, provider details, charges, service lines) needed for downstream validation and adjudication. Returns a JSON string containing all extracted fields.

in_document_reference.description: Storage bucket reference or file path to the claim PDF document to extract. Pass the document_reference value provided in the user prompt.

in_claim_id.description: The unique claim identifier (e.g., CHC-100002). Pass the claim_id value provided in the user prompt.
